reviews.review_title: Its ok but other games are better
reviews.review_description: This game just needs better animations and other stuff. I recommend CleanSheat because its much more better than this, but this game is still pretty decent.
It was so fun I recommend buying this for your kid
I love playing the game because it feels like your an actual goalkeeper making dives and saves so please make more games like this
The gameplay and difficulty is good, but this is overpriced for a goal keeping 'minigame', bundled with training video course nobody asked for!
The game is good and I loved it but I couldn’t play some drills because it’s broken. When I press the start button the ui doesn’t disappear and I can’t do anything but go to the pause menu.

Edit: was 3 stars now 5 stars based on dev quick response for multiple ways to increase cardio workout with more coming.


I like the cardio workout in the free version and upgraded to the premium package to allow me to play infinite mode without losing my momentum by missing 3 balls.  

Unfortunately it isn't allowing me to do this and kills my cardio momentum.  Is there a way to play infinite mode uninterrupted by the number of missed balls with the paid upgrade?

developer_response.body:
Hi jake.735111,

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your feedback with us. We’re thrilled to hear that you’ve been enjoying the cardio workout aspect of Soccer World and that you upgraded to the premium package—your support means a lot to us!

Currently, the specific feature you’re asking for—playing Infinite Mode without interruption from missed balls—is not available in the game. However, we encourage you to check out the Training Center mode. In this mode, there are various drills without any life limits, and you can fully customize your practice duration from 5 to 40 minutes to maintain your cardio momentum. It’s the closest alternative available at the moment.

We truly value your feedback and want you to know that we already have plans on our roadmap to develop a feature aligned with your suggestion. Please stay tuned for updates, as we’re working on enhancements that we’re confident you’ll enjoy in the near future.

Thanks again for your input—it helps us make Soccer World even better!

reviews.review_description: The best app in my opinion for my Quest Three S

reviews.review_title: Don't recommend, just get paid version
reviews.review_description: I tried playing but its always putting the goal right next to my cupboard when I have massive space. I set a boundary and the goal just stays outside the boundary inside my cupboard. I restarted the app many times and I thought it was something wrong with my oculus until I read some of these reviews. Next time make it so you can move the goal? It's an obvious feature.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry to hear about the trouble you had with the goal placement.

We’d like to let you know that the feature to move the goal is already included! On the starting screen of any game mode where you defend the goal, look for the "Adjust Goal in Room" option. This allows you to adjust the goal’s height, width, and drag it to the best position within your play area.

We apologize for any confusion and appreciate you bringing this up—it helps us identify where we can improve clarity in our instructions. We’re here to help and want to ensure you have a much smoother experience next time!

This game is the greatest soccer game I have ever played, when I was doing the infinite mode my calves started hurting but I knew it was a good game because of the pain. To the developers that see this great job on this game. Love it!!
Im so confused it looks like a good game but dont know how to enter game modes like how do you click on them

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're really sorry for the confusion and frustration you experienced with the game. We’ve since fixed the issue that was causing problems with interacting with the main menu and game modes. We appreciate your feedback, as it helped us improve the game, and we hope you’ll give it another try now that the bug has been resolved. Thank you again for your patience and support – we’re always here to listen and improve!
